description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push. It should have two jobs, ci-v8 and ci-quickjs, both running on windows-2019. The ci-v8 job checks out the code, sets up msbuild, downloads an artifact from build_v8.yml, builds a plugin, and runs unit tests. The ci-quickjs job does similar tasks but for quickjs, downloading an artifact from build_quickjs.yml, clearing the quickjs directory, and building a plugin with quickjs.
